001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteGridWithSquares;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010public interface DigSiteGridRepository {
011
012  LiveData<DigSiteGrid> getById(long id);
013
014  LiveData<List<DigSiteGrid>> getAllByPlayerId(long playerId);
015
016  LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> getMostRecentDigSiteGridWithSquaresByPlayerId(long playerId);
017
018  LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> getDigSiteGridWithSquaresById(long id);
019
020  CompletableFuture<Long> insert(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid);
021
022//  CompletableFuture<Long> insert(DigSiteGridWithSquares digSiteGridWithSquares);
023
024  CompletableFuture<Integer> updateRemainingBrushes(long gridId, int remainingBrushes);
025
026  CompletableFuture<Integer> delete(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid);
027
028  CompletableFuture<DigSiteSquare> getSquareByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y);
029
030}
